---


[[01 - Philosophy/02 Ethics/meta-ethics/Meta-ethics essay\|Meta-ethics essay]]

|                 | Moral realism                    | Moral-anti-realism                             |
| --------------- | -------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------- |
| Cognitivism     | [[01 - Philosophy/02 Ethics/meta-ethics/Naturalism\|Naturalism]]<br>Non-naturalism | Error theory                                   |
| Non-cognitivism |                                  | [[01 - Philosophy/02 Ethics/meta-ethics/Emotivism\|Emotivism]]<br>[[01 - Philosophy/02 Ethics/meta-ethics/Emotivism\|Prescriptivism]] |
> [!definitions] Important definitions
> **Realism/anti-realism** is about whether or not mind-independent moral properties *exist*.
> 
> **Cognitivism/non-cognitivism** is about what people *mean* when they make moral judgements.

The theories are linked together to some degree. For example, the arguments against naturalism are the same arguments in favour of non-naturalism, and the arguments against non-naturalism are the same arguments in favour of error theory.

```mermaid
flowchart TD

	A[Moral realism]
	B[Moral anti-realism]
	C([Do moral properties, like good, bad, right and wrong, exist mind independently?])
	D([What kind of properties are they?])
	E([Are moral judgements truth-apt descriptions?])
	F[Moral naturalism]
	F1(['murder is wrong' is a true description if the act of murder has the natural property of wrongness])
	G[Moral non-naturalism]
	G1(['murder is wrong' is a true description if the act of murder has the non-natural property of wrongness])
	H[Error theory]
	H1(['murder is wrong' is a false description because the property of wrongness does not exist])
	I[Non-cognitivism]
	I1([What do people mean when they say 'murder is wrong', then?])
	J[Prescriptivism]
	J1(['murder is wrong' means something like 'don't murder people!' and is neither true or false])
	K[Emotivism]
	K1(['murder is wrong' means something like 'booo! Murder!' and is neither true or false.])

C -- yes --> A
C -- no --> B
A --> D
D -- Natural --> F
F --> F1
D -- supernatural --> G
G --> G1
B --> E
	E -- yes --> H
H --> H1
E -- no --> I
I --> I1
I1 --> J
I1 --> K
J --> J1
K --> K1
```

dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Emotivism says that moral</text><text x="162.25987243652344" y="42.62" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">feelings of approval or</text><text text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">is non-cognitivist.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(171.72864963971745 font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Hume provides a few arguments for the view</text><text x="177.24783325195312" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">that moral judgements are not judgements of</text><text x="177.24783325195312" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">reason.</text><text x="177.24783325195312" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"/><text x="177.24783325195312" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">You can use these to argue against any of</text><text x="177.24783325195312" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">the cognitivist theories.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(71.0081930172953 1259.5457695020198) rotate(0 169 17.5)"><path d="M8.75 0 C95.69 0, 182.64 0, 329.25 0 C335.08 0, 338 163.57989501953125 12.5)"><text x="163.57989501953125" y="17.619999999999997" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Moral judgements motivate action</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(81.36095429364491 1321.9962255493087) rotate(0 166.5 115)"><path d="M32 0 C106.12 0, 180.25 0, 301 0 C322.33 0, 333 10.67, 333 32 C333 69.49, 333 106.98, 333 198 C333 219.33, 322.33 230, 301 230 C201.69 230, 102.38 230, 32 230 C10.67 230, 0 219.33, 0 198 C0 137.09, 0 76.18, 0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#ffd8a8"/><path d="M32 0 C131.66 0, 231.32 0, 301 0 M32 0 C121.88 0, 211.75 0, 301 0 M301 0 C322.33 0, 333 10.67, 333 32 M301 0 C322.33 0, 333 10.67, 333 32 M333 32 C333 73.42, 333 114.84, 333 198 M333 32 C333 86.22, 333 140.43, 333 198 M333 198 C333 219.33, 322.33 230, 301 230 M333 198 C333 219.33, 322.33 230, 301 230 M301 230 C216.22 230, 131.43 230, 32 230 M301 230 C214.64 230, 128.27 230, 32 230 M32 230 C10.67 230, 0 219.33, 0 198 M32 230 C10.67 230, 0 219.33, 0 198 M0 198 C0 140.75, 0 83.5, 0 32 M0 198 C0 138.8, 0 79.61, 0 32 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(86.69310761395741 1326.9962255493087) rotate(0 161.1678466796875 110)"><text x="161.1678466796875" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">According to Hume, judgements of reason</text><text x="161.1678466796875" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">(e.g. the belief that grass is green)</text><text x="161.1678466796875" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">don't motivate us to act. Instead, it's</text><text x="161.1678466796875" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">emotions and desires.</text><text x="161.1678466796875" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"/><text x="161.1678466796875" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">So, the argument is essentially:</text><text x="161.1678466796875" y="134.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">1. moral judgements can motivate action</text><text x="161.1678466796875" y="154.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">2. judgements of reason cannot motivate</text><text x="161.1678466796875" y="174.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">action</text><text x="161.1678466796875" y="194.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">3. therefore, moral judgements are not</text><text x="161.1678466796875" y="214.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">judgements of reason.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(551.800417355129 1289.3741180045977) rotate(0 60 17.5)"><path d="M8.75 0 C47.94 0, 87.13 0, 111.25 0 C117.08 0, 120 2.92, 120 8.75 C120 12.8, 120 16.86, 120 26.25 C120 32.08, 117.08 35, 111.25 35 C80.21 35, 49.17 35, 8.75 35 C2.92 35, 0 32.08, 0 26.25 C0 20.15, 0 14.04, 0 8.75 C0 2.92, 2.92 0, 8.75 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#ffa94d"/><path d="M8.75 0 C38.13 0, 67.51 0, 111.25 0 M8.75 0 C37.5 0, 66.26 0, 111.25 0 M111.25 0 C117.08 0, 120 2.92, 120 8.75 M111.25 0 C117.08 0, 120 2.92, 120 8.75 M120 8.75 C120 14.11, 120 19.47, 120 26.25 M120 8.75 C120 15.47, 120 22.2, 120 26.25 M120 26.25 C120 32.08, 117.08 35, 111.25 35 M120 26.25 C120 32.08, 117.08 35, 111.25 35 M111.25 35 C86.74 35, 62.23 35, 8.75 35 M111.25 35 C73.96 35, 36.67 35, 8.75 35 M8.75 35 C2.92 35, 0 32.08, 0 26.25 M8.75 35 C2.92 35, 0 32.08, 0 26.25 M0 26.25 C0 19.56, 0 12.88, 0 8.75 M0 26.25 C0 21, 0 15.75, 0 8.75 M0 8.75 C0 2.92, 2.92 0, 8.75 0 M0 8.75 C0 2.92, 2.92 0, 8.75 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(556.8604683194844 1294.3741180045977) rotate(0 54.93994903564453 12.5)"><text x="54.93994903564453" y="17.619999999999997" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Hume's fork</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(527.256809328939 1337.7669751474546) rotate(0 182.5 145.00000000000006)"><path d="M32 0 C143.69 0, 255.37 0, 333 0 C354.33 0, 365 10.67, 365 32 C365 113.45, 365 194.9, 365 258 C365 279.33, 354.33 290, 333 290 C234.71 290, 136.43 290, 32 290 C10.67 290, 0 279.33, 0 258 C0 192.05, 0 126.09, 0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#ffd8a8"/><path d="M32 0 C99.7 0, 167.39 0, 333 0 M32 0 C102.84 0, 173.68 0, 333 0 M333 0 C354.33 0, 365 10.67, 365 32 M333 0 C354.33 0, 365 10.67, 365 32 M365 32 C365 112.35, 365 192.7, 365 258 M365 32 C365 99.52, 365 167.04, 365 258 M365 258 C365 279.33, 354.33 290, 333 290 M365 258 C365 279.33, 354.33 290, 333 290 M333 290 C254.21 290, 175.42 290, 32 290 M333 290 C250.33 290, 167.66 290, 32 290 M32 290 C10.67 290, 0 279.33, 0 258 M32 290 C10.67 290, 0 279.33, 0 258 M0 258 C0 173.04, 0 88.09, 0 32 M0 258 C0 208.47, 0 158.94, 0 32 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(534.1089821805015 1342.7669751474546) rotate(0 175.6478271484375 140.00000000000006)"><text x="175.6478271484375" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Hume argued that there are two types of</text><text x="175.6478271484375" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">judgements of reason (i.e. cognitive):</text><text x="175.6478271484375" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">relations of ideas and matters of fact.</text><text x="175.6478271484375" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic"/><text x="175.6478271484375" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Applying Hume's fork to moral judgements, he</text><text x="175.6478271484375" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">argues:</text><text x="175.6478271484375" y="134.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">1. Moral judgements are not relations of</text><text x="175.6478271484375" y="154.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">ideas, because we can conceive of "murder is</text><text x="175.6478271484375" y="174.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">wrong" as being either true or false.</text><text x="175.6478271484375" y="194.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">2. Moral judgements are not matters of fact</text><text x="175.6478271484375" y="214.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">either, because we can't observe or</text><text x="175.6478271484375" y="234.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">empirically verify that "murder is wrong"</text><text x="175.6478271484375" y="254.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">3. Therefore, moral judgements are not</text><text x="175.6478271484375" y="274.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">judgements of reason.</text></g><g transform="translate(661.1864407820924 1062.9786579035836) rotate(0 103.18339341373107 90.11349691465847)"><use href="#image-85038433889c13c313d02f43d34e80d19e449ece" width="206" height="180" opacity="1"/></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(229.36200175983254 stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(234.75206218463723 1662.935664436462) rotate(0 104.10993957519531 12.5)"><text x="104.10993957519531" y="17.619999999999997" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">The is/ought problem</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(143.49519439621633 1692.2552895414674) rotate(0 191.5000057220459 0)"><path d="M0 0 C63.83 0, 319.17 0, 383 0 M0 0 C63.83 0, 319.17 0, 326.67 0, 392 0" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g></g><mask/><g transform="translate(186.83922286911672 1698.0052590238893) rotate(0 57.65593719482422 10)"><text x="57.65593719482422" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">'is' statements</text></g><g transform="translate(364.4512223808355 1697.7552437651002) rotate(0 73.5439224243164 10)"><text x="73.5439224243164" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">'ought' statements</text></g><g transform="translate(158.91133798697012 1730.6188953875258) rotate(0 86.03838833895597 20)"><text x="86.03838833895597" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Factual claims about</text><text x="86.03838833895597" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">what is the case</text></g><g transform="translate(347.48451359066314 1722.4370772057077) rotate(0 91.46525573730472 30)"><text x="91.46525573730472" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Value judgements</text><text x="91.46525573730472" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">about what should be</text><text x="91.46525573730472" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">the case.</text></g><g transform="translate(160.71050804756112 1803.3461403715448) rotate(0 85.14823982932353 20)"><text x="85.14823982932353" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">E.g. "Smith murdered</text><text x="85.14823982932353" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Jones."</text></g><g transform="translate(339.1207468337384 1801.3461847607496) rotate(0 98.91982754794034 20)"><text x="98.91982754794034" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">E.g. "Smith shouldn't</text><text x="98.91982754794034" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">have murdered Jones"</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(561.7202077734172 1703.5106627409111) rotate(0 142 75)"><path d="M32 0 C89.71 0, 147.41 0, 252 0 C273.33 0, 284 10.67, 284 32 C284 63.52, 284 95.04, 284 118 C284 139.33, 273.33 150, 252 150 C176.31 150, 100.63 150, 32 150 C10.67 150, 0 139.33, 0 118 C0 87.76, 0 57.51, 0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#ffd8a8"/><path d="M32 0 C105.67 0, 179.34 0, 252 0 M32 0 C95.93 0, 159.86 0, 252 0 M252 0 C273.33 0, 284 10.67, 284 32 M252 0 C273.33 0, 284 10.67, 284 32 M284 32 C284 56.42, 284 80.84, 284 118 M284 32 C284 52.3, 284 72.59, 284 118 M284 118 C284 139.33, 273.33 150, 252 150 M284 118 C284 139.33, 273.33 150, 252 150 M252 150 C196.17 150, 140.34 150, 32 150 M252 150 C184.02 150, 116.04 150, 32 150 M32 150 C10.67 150, 0 139.33, 0 118 M32 150 C10.67 150, 0 139.33, 0 118 M0 118 C0 91.3, 0 64.6, 0 32 M0 118 C0 99.36, 0 80.73, 0 32 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(576.1203237402141 1708.5106627409111) rotate(0 127.59988403320312 70)"><text x="127.59988403320312" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Hume argues that there is a gap</text><text x="127.59988403320312" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">between the two kinds of claim:</text><text x="127.59988403320312" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">you cannot logically derive ought</text><text x="127.59988403320312" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">statements, like 'you ought not</text><text x="127.59988403320312" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">torture' from statements about</text><text x="127.59988403320312" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">what is, like 'that is an act of</text><text x="127.59988403320312" y="134.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">torture.'</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(168.02739054246308 1888.4143697627699) rotate(0 301.5 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C156.58 0, 295.66 0, 585.5 0 C597.17 0, 603 5.83, 603 17.5 C603 30.05, 603 42.59, 603 52.5 C603 64.17, 597.17 70, 585.5 70 C437.01 70, 288.52 70, 17.5 70 C5.83 70, 0 64.17, 0 52.5 C0 40.26, 0 28.02, 0 17.5 C0 5.83, 5.83 0, 17.5 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#ffd8a8"/><path d="M17.5 0 C160.22 0, 302.93 0, 585.5 0 M17.5 0 C244.61 0, 471.72 0, 585.5 0 M585.5 0 C597.17 0, 603 5.83, 603 17.5 M585.5 0 C597.17 0, 603 5.83, 603 17.5 M603 17.5 C603 30.57, 603 43.65, 603 52.5 M603 17.5 C603 28, 603 38.5, 603 52.5 M603 52.5 C603 64.17, 597.17 70, 585.5 70 M603 52.5 C603 64.17, 597.17 70, 585.5 70 M585.5 70 C411.75 70, 237.99 70, 17.5 70 M585.5 70 C431.42 70, 277.33 70, 17.5 70 M17.5 70 C5.83 70, 0 64.17, 0 52.5 M17.5 70 C5.83 70, 0 64.17, 0 52.5 M0 52.5 C0 43.44, 0 34.37, 0 17.5 M0 52.5 C0 42.33, 0 32.16, 0 17.5 M0 17.5 C0 5.83, 5.83 0, 17.5 0 M0 17.5 C0 5.83, 5.83 0, 17.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(180.6076212553537 1893.4143697627699) rotate(0 288.9197692871094 30)"><text x="288.9197692871094" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">We can argue that this is evidence for non-cognitivism: the reason we</text><text x="288.9197692871094" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">cannot derive 'ought' statements from 'is' statements because the former</text><text x="288.9197692871094" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">is non-cognitive and the latter is cognitive.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(161.74267552423885 1975.7747319911007) rotate(0 323.5 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C156.02 0, 294.53 0, 629.5 0 C641.17 0, 647 5.83, 647 17.5 C647 27.27, 647 37.05, 647 52.5 C647 64.17, 641.17 70, 629.5 70 C397.18 70, 164.87 70, 17.5 70 C5.83 70, 0 64.17, 0 52.5 C0 38.63, 0 24.76, 0 17.5 C0 5.83, 5.83 0, 17.5 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#ffd8a8"/><path d="M17.5 0 C171.65 0, 325.8 0, 629.5 0 M17.5 0 C210.39 0, 403.28 0, 629.5 0 M629.5 0 C641.17 0, 647 5.83, 647 17.5 M629.5 0 C641.17 0, 647 5.83, 647 17.5 M647 17.5 C647 30.83, 647 44.16, 647 52.5 M647 17.5 C647 29.57, 647 41.64, 647 52.5 M647 52.5 C647 64.17, 641.17 70, 629.5 70 M647 52.5 C647 64.17, 641.17 70, 629.5 70 M629.5 70 C446.01 70, 262.53 70, 17.5 70 M629.5 70 C460.86 70, 292.22 70, 17.5 70 M17.5 70 C5.83 70, 0 64.17, 0 52.5 M17.5 70 C5.83 70, 0 64.17, 0 52.5 M0 52.5 C0 38.56, 0 24.62, 0 17.5 M0 52.5 C0 39.58, 0 26.66, 0 17.5 M0 17.5 C0 5.83, 5.83 0, 17.5 0 M0 17.5 C0 5.83, 5.83 0, 17.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(174.9949338250201 1980.7747319911007) rotate(0 310.24774169921875 30)"><text x="310.24774169921875" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Hume would say 'is' statements like "Smith murdered Jones" are capable of being</text><text x="310.24774169921875" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">true or false, whereas 'ought' statements like "Smith shouldn't have murdered</text><text x="310.24774169921875" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Jones" are expressions of emotion that are not capable of being true or false.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(243.62231102132193 2097.7898008163565) rotate(0 181.5 17.5)"><path d="M8.75 0 C80.07 0, 151.38 0, 354.25 0 C360.08 0, 363 2.92, 363 8.75 C363 13.61, 363 x="176.09986877441406" y="17.619999999999997" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">A.J. Ayer: Language, truth, and logic</text></g><g transform="translate(564.8857399119041 2158.7057226873803) rotate(0 150 131)"><use href="#image-081d68eaecc638cb5d1e2797a4995692fc7b5287" width="300" height="262" opacity="1"/></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(121.49959111417206 2156.9471944968554) rotate(0 121.5 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C87.44 0, 157.38 0, 225.5 0 C237.17 0, 243 0, 17.5 0 M0 17.5 C0 5.83, 5.83 0, 17.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(129.87168431485566 2161.9471944968554) rotate(0 113.1279067993164 30)"><text x="113.1279067993164" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Ayer's verification principle is</text><text x="113.1279067993164" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">basically just Hume's fork</text><text x="113.1279067993164" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">with different words.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(147.31605950144683 2251.7226998441447) rotate(0 193.5 55)"><path d="M27.5 0 C119.75 0, 212 0, 359.5 0 C377.83 0, 387 9.17, 387 27.5 C387 39.19, 387 50.88, 387 82.5 C387 100.83, 377.83 110, 359.5 110 C242.3 110, 125.1 110, 27.5 110 C9.17 110, 0 100.83, 0 82.5 C0 71.37, 0 60.23, 0 27.5 C0 9.17, 9.17 0, 27.5 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#ffd8a8"/><path d="M27.5 0 C96.52 0, 165.54 0, 359.5 0 M27.5 0 C110.97 0, 194.44 0, 359.5 0 M359.5 0 C377.83 0, 387 9.17, 387 27.5 M359.5 0 C377.83 0, 387 9.17, 387 27.5 M387 27.5 C387 43.09, 387 58.69, 387 82.5 M387 27.5 C387 40.41, 387 53.31, 387 82.5 M387 82.5 C387 100.83, 377.83 110, 359.5 110 M387 82.5 C387 100.83, 377.83 110, 359.5 110 M359.5 110 C284.52 110, 209.54 110, 27.5 110 M359.5 110 C282.99 110, 206.48 110, 27.5 110 M27.5 110 C9.17 110, 0 100.83, 0 82.5 M27.5 110 C9.17 110, 0 100.83, 0 82.5 M0 82.5 C0 62.32, 0 42.14, 0 27.5 M0 82.5 C0 68.73, 0 54.97, 0 27.5 M0 27.5 C0 9.17, 9.17 0, 27.5 0 M0 27.5 C0 9.17, 9.17 0, 27.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(154.15222588328277 2256.7226998441447) rotate(0 186.66383361816406 50)"><text x="186.66383361816406" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Ayer argues that moral judgements fail the</text><text x="186.66383361816406" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">verification principle. "Murder is wrong" is clearly</text><text x="186.66383361816406" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">not an analytic truth, and Ayer argues that it</text><text x="186.66383361816406" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">isn't empirically verifiable either - both on the</text><text x="186.66383361816406" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">naturalist and non-naturalist interpretations:</text></g><g transform="translate(168.2641349120895 2401.799961401098) rotate(0 39.29595184326172 10)"><text x="39.29595184326172" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Naturalism</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(133.94758711606175 2396.6170136351047) rotate(0 0 155.27636348043643)"><path d="M0 0 C0 51.76, 0 258.79, 0 310.55 M0 0 C0 51.76, 0 258.79, 0 310.55" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g></g><mask/><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(135.00215562354686 2396.6170136351047) rotate(0 209.46309745032204 0)"><path d="M0 0 C69.82 0, 349.11 0, 418.93 0 M0 0 C69.82 0, 349.11 0, 418.93 0" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g></g><mask/><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(557.663711653478 2397.9080352918854) rotate(0 0 157.37915859937743)"><path d="M0 0 C0 52.46, 0 262.3, 0 314.76 M0 0 C0 52.46, 0 262.3, 0 314.76" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g></g><mask/><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(351.944624580071 2398.3107711891726) rotate(0 0 155.80362020376526)"><path d="M0 0 C0 51.93, 0 259.67, 0 311.61 M0 0 C0 51.93, 0 259.67, 0 311.61" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g></g><mask/><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(137.1112825814066 2424.0356741443916) rotate(0 209.32464177827026 0)"><path d="M0 0 C69.77 0, 348.87 0, 418.65 0 M0 0 C69.77 0, 348.87 0, 418.65 0" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g></g><mask/><g transform="translate(388.5076610386149 2400.799859246112) rotate(0 55.11194610595703 10)"><text x="55.11194610595703" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">non-naturalism</text></g><g transform="translate(141.1738529828731 2432.5413871201504) rotate(0 100.57600482328547 120)"><text x="100.57600482328546" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Naturalism would argue</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">that we can prove that</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">murder causes pain/anger</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">etc. However, Ayer would</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">argue that this isn't the</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">same as proving murder is</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="134.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">wrong. We can empirically</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="154.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">verify that murder</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="174.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">causes pain, but we</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="194.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">cannot empirically verify</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="214.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">that murder has the</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="234.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">property of 'wrongness'</text></g><g transform="translate(357.4560504151973 2428.3364893999997) rotate(0 96.32183178266244 140)"><text x="96.32183178266244" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Ayer also argues that</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">there is no way to</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">empirically verify the</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">presence of non-natural</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">properties - i.e.</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">supernatural properties.</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="134.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Even if "murder is</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="154.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">wrong" did possess the</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="174.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">non-natural property of</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="194.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">wrongness, how could we</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="214.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">ever prove this? The</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="234.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">existence of non-natural</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="254.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">properties cannot be</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="274.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">empirically proven.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(131.60429404386412 2706.2536502624025) rotate(0 212.99424385391967 0)"><path d="M0 0 C71 0, 354.99 0, 425.99 0 M0 0 C71 0, 354.99 0, 425.99 0" transform="translate(586.3993425384149 2517.8450661626907) rotate(0 120.087890625 50)"><text x="120.087890625" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Therefore, Ayer concludes</text><text x="120.087890625" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">that moral judgements simply</text><text x="120.087890625" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">express feelings of approval or</text><text x="120.087890625" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">disapproval, and seek to evoke</text><text x="120.087890625" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">the same feeling in others.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(373.5618190218257 2774.2239027280025) rotate(0 98.5 22.5)"><path d="M11.25 0 C55.71 dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Prescriptivism says that moral judgements express</text><text x="196.88780212402344" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">(non-cognitive) instructions that aim to guide</text><text x="196.88780212402344" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">behaviour.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(148.37619749933936 2881.1830471728513) rotate(0 219 25)"><path d="M12.5 0 C97.67 0, text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">So, when someone says "murder is wrong", they really</text><text x="204.40782165527344" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">mean "don't murder people."</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(644.8868928182 2792.163784430137) rotate(0 129.19225135216345 75)"><path d="M32 0 Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">When you instruct someone to</text><text x="123.46388244628906" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">do something (e.g. "shut the</text><text x="123.46388244628906" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">door") you are not expressing a</text><text x="123.46388244628906" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">belief that is capable of being</text><text x="123.46388244628906" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">true or false. Therefore,</text><text x="123.46388244628906" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">prescriptivism is a non-cognitive</text><text x="123.46388244628906" y="134.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">theory.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Keep in mind that this topic is very interlinked.</text><text x="182.34384155273438" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">The arguments for one thing will be the</text><text x="182.34384155273438" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">counterarguments for it's opposite, and vice-</text><text x="182.34384155273438" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" 194.6157989501953 20)"><text x="194.6157989501953" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Hare agrees with emotivism that moral judgements</text><text x="194.6157989501953" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">express attitudes, hence are non-cognitive.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(316.6162689171771 3076.360080010877) rotate(0 223.5 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C179.13 0, 340.75 0, 429.5 0 C441.17 0, 447 5.83, 447 17.5 C447 30.21, 447 42.92, 447 52.5 C447 64.17, 441.17 70, 429.5 70 C266.39 70, 103.28 70, 17.5 70 C5.83 70, 0 64.17, 0 52.5 C0 43.65, 0 34.81, 0 17.5 C0 5.83, 5.83 0, 17.5 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#fcc2d7"/><path d="M17.5 0 C169.68 0, 321.86 0, 429.5 0 M17.5 0 C142.27 0, 267.04 0, 429.5 0 M429.5 0 C441.17 0, 447 5.83, 447 17.5 M429.5 0 C441.17 0, 447 5.83, 447 17.5 M447 17.5 C447 24.72, 447 31.95, 447 52.5 M447 17.5 C447 31.07, 447 44.64, 447 52.5 M447 52.5 C447 64.17, 441.17 70, 429.5 70 M447 52.5 C447 64.17, 441.17 70, 429.5 70 M429.5 70 C278.66 70, 127.82 70, 17.5 70 M429.5 70 C294.25 70, 158.99 70, 17.5 70 M17.5 70 C5.83 70, 0 64.17, 0 52.5 M17.5 70 C5.83 70, 0 64.17, 0 52.5 M0 52.5 C0 43.23, 0 33.96, 0 17.5 M0 52.5 C0 44.51, 0 36.52, 0 17.5 M0 17.5 C0 5.83, 5.83 0, 17.5 0 M0 17.5 C0 5.83, 5.83 0, 17.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(322.30048827752864 3081.360080010877) rotate(0 217.81578063964844 30)"><text x="217.81578063964844" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">But, Hare argues that this isn't the main point of moral</text><text x="217.81578063964844" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">judgements: the main point being to guide conduct. E.g.</text><text x="217.81578063964844" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">"stealing is wrong" implies the imperative: "don't steal."</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(106.86557666888348 3163.246815927131) rotate(0 146 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C120.1 0, 222.69 0, 274.5 0 C286.17 0, 292 5.83, 292 17.5 C292 30.64, 292 43.78, 292 52.5 C292 64.17, 286.17 70, 274.5 70 C183.9 70, 93.3 70, 17.5 70 C5.83 70, 0 64.17, 0 52.5 C0 38.72, 0 24.94, 0 17.5 C0 5.83, 5.83 0, 17.5 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#fcc2d7"/><path d="M17.5 0 C89.64 0, 161.77 0, 274.5 0 M17.5 0 C101.42 0, 185.34 0, 274.5 0 M274.5 0 C286.17 0, 292 5.83, 292 17.5 M274.5 0 C286.17 0, 292 5.83, 292 17.5 M292 17.5 C292 29.27, 292 41.04, 292 52.5 M292 17.5 C292 31.28, 292 45.06, 292 52.5 M292 52.5 C292 64.17, 286.17 70, 274.5 70 M292 52.5 C292 64.17, 286.17 70, 274.5 70 M274.5 70 C216.83 70, 159.17 70, 17.5 70 M274.5 70 C181.57 70, 88.65 70, 17.5 70 M17.5 70 C5.83 70, 0 64.17, 0 52.5 M17.5 70 C5.83 70, 0 64.17, 0 52.5 M0 52.5 C0 42.45, 0 32.4, 0 17.5 M0 52.5 C0 41.22, 0 29.94, 0 17.5 M0 17.5 C0 5.83, 5.83 0, 17.5 0 M0 17.5 C0 5.83, 5.83 0, 17.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(126.74569599261395 3168.246815927131) rotate(0 126.11988067626953 30)"><text x="126.11988067626953" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">As well as this, Hare provides an</text><text x="126.11988067626953" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">analysis of general value terms,</text><text x="126.11988067626953" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">such as good/bad/right/wrong.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(111.45305275338967 3247.1207465618563) rotate(0 170.5 39)"><path d="M19.5 0 C109.05 0, 198.59 0, 321.5 0 C334.5 0, 341 6.5, 341 19.5 C341 30.32, 341 41.13, 341 58.5 C341 71.5, 334.5 78, 321.5 78 C221.92 78, 122.35 78, 19.5 78 C6.5 78, 0 71.5, 0 58.5 C0 45.83, 0 33.15, 0 19.5 C0 6.5, 6.5 0, 19.5 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#fcc2d7"/><path d="M19.5 0 C130.32 0, 241.13 0, 321.5 0 M19.5 0 C95.08 0, 170.66 0, 321.5 0 M321.5 0 C334.5 0, 341 6.5, 341 19.5 M321.5 0 C334.5 0, 341 6.5, 341 19.5 M341 19.5 C341 30.34, 341 41.17, 341 58.5 M341 19.5 C341 33.86, 341 48.22, 341 58.5 M341 58.5 C341 71.5, 334.5 78, 321.5 78 M341 58.5 C341 71.5, 334.5 78, 321.5 78 M321.5 78 C214.89 78, 108.28 78, 19.5 78 M321.5 78 C204.72 78, 87.93 78, 19.5 78 M19.5 78 C6.5 78, 0 71.5, 0 58.5 M19.5 78 C6.5 78, 0 71.5, 0 58.5 M0 58.5 C0 47.01, 0 35.53, 0 19.5 M0 58.5 C0 50.63, 0 42.76, 0 19.5 M0 19.5 C0 6.5, 6.5 0, 19.5 0 M0 19.5 C0 6.5, 6.5 0, 19.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(119.88112282174905 3252.3707465618563) rotate(0 162.07192993164062 33.75)"><text x="162.07192993164062" y="15.858" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="18px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">He argues that the meaning of these</text><text x="162.07192993164062" y="38.358000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="18px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">terms is not to simply describe, but</text><text x="162.07192993164062" y="60.858000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="18px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">to commend or criticise.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(112.2529047510335 3339.637117227781) rotate(0 183.5 85)"><path d="M32 0 C125.19 0, 218.37 0, 335 0 C356.33 0, 367 10.67, 367 32 C367 61.51, 367 91.03, 367 138 C367 159.33, 356.33 170, 335 170 C244.11 170, 153.22 170, 32 170 C10.67 170, 0 159.33, 0 138 C0 96.68, 0 55.35, 0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#fcc2d7"/><path d="M32 0 C137.66 0, 243.32 0, 335 0 M32 0 C138 0, 243.99 0, 335 0 M335 0 C356.33 0, 367 10.67, 367 32 M335 0 C356.33 0, 367 10.67, 367 32 M367 32 C367 59.92, 367 87.85, 367 138 M367 32 C367 54.74, 367 77.48, 367 138 M367 138 C367 159.33, 356.33 170, 335 170 M367 138 C367 159.33, 356.33 170, 335 170 M335 170 C242.52 170, 150.04 170, 32 170 M335 170 C221.4 170, 107.8 170, 32 170 M32 170 C10.67 170, 0 159.33, 0 138 M32 170 C10.67 170, 0 159.33, 0 138 M0 138 C0 109.32, 0 80.64, 0 32 M0 138 C0 111.83, 0 85.67, 0 32 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(117.26506600591631 3354.637117227781) rotate(0 178.4878387451172 70)"><text x="178.4878387451172" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">In order to commend/criticise something, we</text><text x="178.4878387451172" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">must assume a certain set of standards - i.e.</text><text x="178.4878387451172" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">criteria to judge it by - like the standards</text><text x="178.4878387451172" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">for the strawberry were 'sweet and juicy'.</text><text x="178.4878387451172" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">However, these standards aren't objective,</text><text x="178.4878387451172" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">and there are no facts that can determine</text><text x="178.4878387451172" y="134.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">one set of standards as correct or incorrect.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(537.3243795623515 3165.584427368423) rotate(0 147.42856464688742 103.99993896484375)"><path d="M32 0 C84.24 0, 136.48 0, 262.86 0 C284.19 0, 294.86 10.67, 294.86 32 C294.86 89.08, 294.86 146.15, 294.86 176 C294.86 197.33, 284.19 208, 262.86 208 C191.77 208, 120.69 208, 32 208 C10.67 208, 0 197.33, 0 176 C0 137.44, 0 98.88, 0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#f783ac"/><path d="M32 0 C108.3 0, 184.6 0, 262.86 0 M32 0 C99.72 0, 167.45 0, 262.86 0 M262.86 0 C284.19 0, 294.86 10.67, 294.86 32 M262.86 0 C284.19 0, 294.86 10.67, 294.86 32 M294.86 32 C294.86 66.47, 294.86 100.95, 208, 32 208 M262.86 208 C196.61 208, 130.36 208, 32 208 M32 208 C10.67 208, 0 197.33, 0 176 M32 208 C10.67 208, 0 197.33, 0 176 M0 176 C0 126.09, 0 76.17, 0 32 M0 176 C0 146.1, 0 116.21, 0 32 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><clipPath id="image-clipPath-IGsiQSTB" clipPathUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><rect x="0" y="0" width="412.25847328544705" height="412.25847328544705" rx="32" ry="32"/></clipPath><g transform="translate(527.7795406471685 3213.7633513223172) rotate(0 206.12923664272353 206.12923664272353)" clip-path="url(#image-clipPath-IGsiQSTB)"><use href="#image-27678334b3b9931c87cbaac6561a5a7ab4d091b1" width="412" height="412" opacity="1"/></g><g transform="translate(541.9947792109924 3180.388109964833) rotate(0 138.63327443502806 11.25)"><text x="138.63327443502806" y="15.858" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="18px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">The example of the strawberry</text></g><g stroke-opacity="0.6" fill-opacity="0.6" stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(552.3406858579199 3239.3589194673673) rotate(0 181.56824929587142 182.60284982705775)"><path d="M32 0 C119.19 0, 206.38 0, 331.14 0 C352.47 0, 363.14 10.67, 363.14 32 C363.14 117.69, 363.14 203.39, 363.14 333.21 C363.14 354.54, 352.47 365.21, 331.14 365.21 C243.65 365.21, 156.16 365.21, 32 365.21 C10.67 365.21, 0 354.54, 0 333.21 C0 248.33, 0 163.46, 0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#1e1e1e"/><path d="M32 0 C103.88 0, 175.77 0, 331.14 0 M32 0 C116.13 0, 200.27 0, 331.14 0 M331.14 0 C352.47 0, 363.14 10.67, 363.14 32 M331.14 0 C352.47 0, 363.14 10.67, 363.14 32 M363.14 32 C363.14 102.49, 363.14 172.97, 363.14 333.21 M363.14 32 C363.14 111.63, 363.14 191.27, 363.14 333.21 M363.14 333.21 C363.14 354.54, 352.47 365.21, 331.14 365.21 M363.14 333.21 C363.14 354.54, 352.47 365.21, 331.14 365.21 M331.14 365.21 C226.66 365.21, 122.18 365.21, 32 365.21 M331.14 365.21 C236.05 365.21, 140.96 365.21, 32 365.21 M32 365.21 C10.67 365.21, 0 354.54, 0 333.21 M32 365.21 C10.67 365.21, 0 354.54, 0 333.21 M0 333.21 C0 245.49, 0 157.77, 0 32 M0 333.21 C0 269.53, 0 205.85, 0 32 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(561.6517157118376 3254.8776511733413) rotate(0 167.60143811966498 170)"><text x="167.60143811966498" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">There is a 'good' strawberry. A purely</text><text x="167.60143811966498" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">descriptive analysis of a 'good strawberry'</text><text x="167.60143811966498" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">might reduce its meaning to 'sweet and</text><text x="167.60143811966498" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">juicy'. But, description is clearly not the</text><text x="167.60143811966498" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">only intended meaning when one says 'this</text><text x="167.60143811966498" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">is a good strawberry', because there are</text><text x="167.60143811966498" y="134.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">ways in which we could use language to</text><text x="167.60143811966498" y="154.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">conflict with this analysis. For example, I</text><text x="167.60143811966498" y="174.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">might say "this is a good strawberry</text><text x="167.60143811966498" y="194.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">BECAUSE it is sweet and juicy" - and this</text><text x="167.60143811966498" y="214.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">statement doesn't make sense on the</text><text x="167.60143811966498" y="234.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">purely descriptive analysis because it</text><text x="167.60143811966498" y="254.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">would be like saying "this is a sweet and</text><text x="167.60143811966498" y="274.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">juicy strawberry BECAUSE it is sweet and</text><text x="167.60143811966498" y="294.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">juicy." So, according to Hare, 'good</text><text x="167.60143811966498" y="314.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">strawberry' does not simply describe, it</text><text x="167.60143811966498" y="334.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">commends.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(113.8966930239435 3513.0704502825674) rotate(0 195 55)"><path d="M27.5 0 C160.23 0, 292.97 0, 362.5 0 C380.83 0, 390 9.17, 390 27.5 C390 46.93, 390 66.35, 390 82.5 C390 100.83, 380.83 110, 362.5 110 C293.94 110, 225.38 110, 27.5 110 C9.17 110, 0 100.83, 0 82.5 C0 62.92, 0 43.35, 0 27.5 C0 9.17, 9.17 0, 27.5 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#fcc2d7"/><path d="M27.5 0 C144.69 0, 261.88 0, 362.5 0 M27.5 0 C115.08 0, 202.66 0, 362.5 0 M362.5 0 C380.83 0, 390 9.17, 390 27.5 M362.5 0 C380.83 0, 390 9.17, 390 27.5 M390 27.5 C390 39.3, 390 51.1, 390 82.5 M390 27.5 C390 48.22, 390 68.95, 390 82.5 M390 82.5 C390 100.83, 380.83 110, 362.5 110 M390 82.5 C390 100.83, 380.83 110, 362.5 110 M362.5 110 C236.9 110, 111.31 110, 27.5 110 M362.5 110 C257.41 110, 152.31 110, 27.5 110 M27.5 110 C9.17 110, 0 100.83, 0 82.5 M27.5 110 C9.17 110, 0 100.83, 0 82.5 M0 82.5 C0 68.92, 0 55.35, 0 27.5 M0 82.5 C0 64.14, 0 45.78, 0 27.5 M0 27.5 C0 9.17, 9.17 0, 27.5 0 M0 27.5 C0 9.17, 9.17 0, 27.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(121.52884939601381 3518.0704502825674) rotate(0 187.3678436279297 50)"><text x="187.3678436279297" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Returning back to moral judgements, these work</text><text x="187.3678436279297" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">in a similar way to the strawberry: when I say</text><text x="187.3678436279297" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">"she is a good person" I am assuming a certain</text><text x="187.3678436279297" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">set of moral standards, and commending that</text><text x="187.3678436279297" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">person against those standards.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(356.26036299255975 32.39999999999998) rotate(0 -21 8.2671486531774)"><path d="M0 0 C-13.13 0, -26.26 0, -35.63 0 M0 0 C-10.87 0, -21.75 0, -35.63 0 M-35.63 0 C-39.88 0, -42 -2.12, -42 -6.37 M-35.63 0 C-39.88 0, -42 -2.12, -42 -6.37 M-42 -6.37 C-42 -6.37, -42 -6.37, -42 -6.37 transform="translate(530.4305903116862 116.17143576485768) rotate(0 123.13587188720703 60)"><text x="123.13587188720703" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#69db7c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Naturalism argues that moral</text><text x="123.13587188720703" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#69db7c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">judgements are beliefs that are</text><text x="123.13587188720703" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#69db7c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">intended to be true or false</text><text x="123.13587188720703" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#69db7c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">(cognitivism) and that moral</text><text x="123.13587188720703" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#69db7c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">properties exist (realism) and</text><text x="123.13587188720703" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#69db7c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">are natural properties.</text></g><g Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#69db7c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">So, the statement "murder is wrong"</text><text x="141.35186767578125" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#69db7c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">expresses a cognitive belief that</text><text x="141.35186767578125" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#69db7c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">murder is wrong, where 'wrong'</text><text x="141.35186767578125" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#69db7c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">refers to a natural property.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(323.02677408854163 298.7713197980608) rotate(0 132 45)"><path d="M22.5 0 C104.95 dominant-baseline="alphabetic">A natural property is something</text><text x="125.08789825439453" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#69db7c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">like grass having the property</text><text x="125.08789825439453" y="54.096000000000004" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">J.S. Mill argues that</text><text x="105.39190673828125" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#40c057" text-anchor="middle" sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#40c057" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">but it is the only good.</text></g><g as</text><text x="128.11187744140625" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#40c057" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">truth and freedom - are part of</text><text x="128.11187744140625" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#40c057" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">what happiness is to us.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(94.52745128813251 734.9329779488698) rotate(0 216.48779296875 130)"><text x="216.48779296875" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#40c057" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">- The only proof that something is desirable is that</text><text x="216.48779296875" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#40c057" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">people desire it</text><text x="216.48779296875" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#40c057" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">- no proof can be given for why general happiness is</text><text x="216.48779296875" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#40c057" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">desirable other than the fact that each person desires</text><text x="216.48779296875" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#40c057" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">happiness</text><text x="216.48779296875" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#40c057" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">- this desirability is "all the proof the case admits of"</text><text x="216.48779296875" y="134.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#40c057" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">that happiness is a good thing</text><text x="216.48779296875" y="154.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#40c057" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">- all our other values (truth, freedom, dignity etc)</text><text x="216.48779296875" y="174.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#40c057" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">constitute what make us happy</text><text x="216.48779296875" y="194.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#40c057" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">-- in other words, the reason we value these things is</text><text x="216.48779296875" y="214.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#40c057" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">because they make is happy</text><text x="216.48779296875" y="234.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#40c057" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">- therefore, not only is happiness good, it is the only</text><text x="216.48779296875" y="254.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#40c057" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">good.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(625.2663065592448 467.58795747302815) rotate(0 135.5 17.5)"><path d="M8.75 0 C79.56 1.41, 151.31 0.36, x="130.08990478515625" y="17.619999999999997" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#099268" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Virtue ethics as naturalism</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(626.5043538411459 509.0522617158433) rotate(0 167.5 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C121.84 -3.24, 227.02 -2.66, 317.5 0 C330.23 -0.46, 331.49 7.2, 335 17.5 C331.09 26.98, 337.26 43.68, 335 52.5 C338.13 62.15, 332.63 69.6, 317.5 70 C255.15 66.9, 187.2 66.72, 17.5 70 C4.29 30)"><text x="162.0638427734375" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#12b886" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Although utilitarianism is the obvious</text><text x="162.0638427734375" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#12b886" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">form of moral naturalism, some see virtue</text><text x="162.0638427734375" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#12b886" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">ethics as a form of moral naturalism, too.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(777.218741280692 588.3141904558453) rotate(0 157 15)"><path d="M7.5 0 C107.06 5.07, 202.54 4.16, 306.5 0 C308.09 -2.61, 316.75 4.48, 314 7.5 C313.55 11.03, 313.48 17.83, 314 22.5 C317.24 25.82, 310.34 28.08, 306.5 30 C227.14 28.54, 153.78 28.46, 7.5 x="151.911865234375" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#12b886" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">For example, Aristotle's ergon/function</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(581.0758361816407 640.7427793230328) rotate(0 180 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C85.57 -0.93, 149.5 -0.7, 342.5 0 C353.77 -3.03, 359.51 4.13, 360 17.5 C357.79 29.61, 359.31 45.62, 360 52.5 C356.63 60.96, 355.61 66.69, 342.5 70 C248.79 70.01, 154.26 68.07, 17.5 70 C2.44 69.52, 172.55984497070312 30)"><text x="172.55984497070312" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#12b886" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Aristotle sees everything as having a</text><text x="172.55984497070312" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#12b886" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">function - or ergon. Things are good if they</text><text x="172.55984497070312" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#12b886" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">fulfil their function, and bad if they don't.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(798.9044756208149 730.2569634573799) rotate(0 127.5 15)"><path d="M7.5 0 C75.43 3.19, 144.8 -0.48, 247.5 0 C250.58 -1.54, 254.6 3.32, 255 7.5 C252.28 10.29, 254.61 12.41, 255 22.5 C255.08 30.3, 251.47 29.99, 247.5 30 122.13589477539062 10)"><text x="122.13589477539062" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#12b886" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">A knife's ergon is to cut things</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(597.4421691894535 775.599804469517) rotate(0 158.5 55)"><path d="M27.5 0 C92.78 -2.27, 154.21 1.57, 289.5 0 C304.52 -0.41, 316.8 7.45, 317 27.5 C317.76 40.73, 317.29 58.19, 317 82.5 C320.02 102.31, 309.88 112.7, 289.5 110 C226.16 105.84, 166.44
