780.599804469517) rotate(0 145.30389404296875 50)"><text x="145.30389404296875" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#12b886" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">A human's function is to use reason.</text><text x="145.30389404296875" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#12b886" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">This does not mean we achieve</text><text x="145.30389404296875" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#12b886" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">eudamonia by just thinking, but that</text><text x="145.30389404296875" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#12b886" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">we use reason in accordance with our</text><text x="145.30389404296875" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#12b886" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">virtues (good character traits)</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(810.0398341587613 898.457198006766) rotate(0 139 55)"><path d="M27.5 0 C72.4 0.27, 122.67 -0.69, 250.5 0 C268.82 -3.39, 277.52 6.61, 278 27.5 C281.1 46.28, 280.29 68.18, 278 82.5 C275.82 97.64, 269.02 113.02, 250.5 110 C188.08 108.19, 128.28 106.82, 27.5 110 M0 27.5 C-0.65 8.1, 8.31 -0.22, 27.5 0 M0 27.5 C0.52 7.01, 7.12 0.92, 27.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(822.3359538487027 903.457198006766) rotate(0 126.7038803100586 50)"><text x="126.7038803100586" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#12b886" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Just as sharpness helps a knife</text><text x="126.7038803100586" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#12b886" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">fulfil it's ergon to cut, virtues</text><text x="126.7038803100586" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#12b886" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">help humans to fulfil their ergon,</text><text x="126.7038803100586" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#12b886" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">which is to choose actions</text><text x="126.7038803100586" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#12b886" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">according to reason.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(604.7297428676059 1019.7427727835516) rotate(0 162.5 25)"><path d="M12.5 0 C100.54 2.74, 193.42 2.02, 312.5 0 C323.53 -2.34, 326.88 interpreted as a discussion</text><text x="154.69586181640625" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#89cf07" text-anchor="middle" transform="translate(734.2518637520925 1089.4570955548968) rotate(0 152.46385192871094 50)"><text x="152.46385192871094" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#89cf07" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">We might argue that it is a natural</text><text x="152.46385192871094" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#89cf07" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">fact that the function of human</text><text x="152.46385192871094" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#89cf07" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">beings is to use reason - the same way</text><text x="152.46385192871094" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#89cf07" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">it is a natural fact that the function</text><text x="152.46385192871094" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#89cf07" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">of a knife is to cut things.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(650.4614693777899 1212.9714736938474) rotate(0 174 54.99999999999994)"><path d="M27.5 0 C139.69 -0.93, 251.31 0.37, 320.5 0 C335.62 1.78, 347.1 8.95, 348 27.5 C347.76 36.01, 350.6 47.44, 348 82.5 C347.03 98.78, 338.81 112.25, 320.5 110 transform="translate(656.0136239188055 1217.9714736938474) rotate(0 168.44784545898438 49.99999999999994)"><text x="168.44784545898438" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#89cf07" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">There is nothing non-natural about claiming</text><text x="168.44784545898438" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#89cf07" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">that the function of a knife is to cut</text><text x="168.44784545898438" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#89cf07" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">things, and likewise nothing non-natural</text><text x="168.44784545898438" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#89cf07" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">about claiming that the function of human</text><text x="168.44784545898438" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#89cf07" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">beings is to use reason.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(548.1045815604072 1335.0572618756976) rotate(0 163.5 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C78.87 -1.58, 138.5 2.41, 309.5 0 C321.69 -2.75, 330.37 3.25, 327 17.5 C328.89 26.91, 325.19 36.84, 327 font-size="16px" fill="#89cf07" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">So, on this reading, 'good' reduces to a</text><text x="157.7278594970703" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#89cf07" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" font-size="16px" fill="#89cf07" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">performing that function well. </text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" x="103.37590026855469" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#89cf07" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" font-size="16px" fill="#89cf07" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">because being courageous</text><text x="103.37590026855469" y="74.096" act correctly</text><text x="103.37590026855469" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#89cf07" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" Naturalistic fallacy</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(50.11863272530684 1244.3928767613) rotate(0 193.5 25)"><path d="M12.5 0 C156.11 1.31, 295.77 2.86, 374.5 0 C382.77 -2.43, stroke-width="2" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(64.97880118233809 1249.3928767613) rotate(0 178.63983154296875 20)"><text x="178.63983154296875" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">This is the fallacy of equating goodness with</text><text x="178.63983154296875" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">some natural property (such as pleasure/pain)</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(46.30254690987715 1307.8856996808731) rotate(0 200.5 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C125.13 1.58, 236.08 -1.3, 383.5 0 C391.57 -1.01, 400 5.59, 401 17.5 C403.38 27.5, 400.46 38.98, 401 52.5 C398.2 66.95, 393.74 73.48, 383.5 70 C247.97 73.1, 116.75 72.86, 17.5 70 C2.51 66.86, 0.06 64.37, 0 52.5 C2.5 37.23, -3.46 24.62, 0 17.5 C3.57 2.62, 8.57 -0.53, 17.5 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#ffd8a8"/><path d="M17.5 0 C148.64 1.14, 276.32 1.11, 383.5 0 M17.5 0 C109.8 0.73, 202.23 1, 383.5 0 M383.5 0 C395.62 -1.87, 399.22 6.63, 401 17.5 M383.5 0 C393.05 -0.26, 400.87 4.74, 401 17.5 M401 17.5 C401.27 26.19, 401.01 37.23, 401 52.5 M401 M0 17.5 C1.91 7.65, 6.77 -1.28, 17.5 0 M0 17.5 C2.21 4.49, 6.26 0.23, 17.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(52.32268851143965 1312.8856996808731) rotate(0 194.4798583984375 30)"><text x="194.4798583984375" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">For example, Moore says it is a fallacy to</text><text x="194.4798583984375" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">conclude that drinking beer is good from the fact</text><text x="194.4798583984375" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">that drinking beer is pleasurable.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(86.38238089425215 1400.0285851614815) rotate(0 162.5 45)"><path d="M22.5 0 C78.35 1.8, 136.85 1.32, 302.5 0 C319.36 -1.43, 323.94 6.13, 325 22.5 C329.1 34.82, 328.53 46.01, 325 67.5 C321.58 81.06, 317.58 88.17, 302.5 C92.77 0.18, 163.37 0.83, 302.5 0 M22.5 0 C113.15 1.2, 203.1 1.87, 302.5 0 M302.5 0 C316.55 0.04, 326.55 6.93, 325 22.5 M302.5 0 C317.49 -2.17, 324.7 5.87, 325 22.5 M325 22.5 C326.68 38.48, 326.23 -0.99 32.11, 0 22.5 M0 22.5 C0.2 7.46, 6.15 -0.36, 22.5 0 M0 22.5 C-1.51 8.36, 7.87 -2.1, 22.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(92.81051199776778 1405.0285851614815) rotate(0 156.07186889648438 40)"><text x="156.07186889648438" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">These are two different categories of</text><text x="156.07186889648438" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">properties - even if they are correlated,</text><text x="156.07186889648438" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">it can't follow that they are the same</text><text x="156.07186889648438" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">thing.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(175.72669546944746 1495.9426629202705) rotate(0 228 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C164.87 -0.3, 315.18 0.42, font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">From this, Moore would argue that Mill's proof is invalid:</text><text x="222.77578735351562" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">To conclude that happiness (a natural property) is</text><text x="222.77578735351562" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">'good' (a moral property) commits the naturalistic fallacy.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(104.23937661307195 1595.485701424735) rotate(0 92.5 15)"><path d="M7.5 0 C78.43 -5.89, 140.91 -2.39, 177.5 0 C180.67 -3.32, 181.86 2.56, 185 7.5 C184.24 14.19, 182.98 14.3, 185 22.5 C181.87 31.07, 179.29 32.73, 177.5 30 C126.46 33.84, 78.03 32.9, 7.5 dominant-baseline="alphabetic">The is/ought problem</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(203.5037996572654 1700.7714826240726) rotate(0 191.5000057220459 0)"><path d="M0 0 C63.83 0, 319.17 0, 383 0 M0 0 C63.83 0, 319.17 0, 383 0" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g></g><mask/><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(206.50379202787087 57.65593719482422 10)"><text x="57.65593719482422" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">'is' statements</text></g><g transform="translate(424.45982764188454 1706.2714368477054) rotate(0 73.5439224243164 10)"><text x="73.5439224243164" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">'ought' statements</text></g><g transform="translate(218.91994324801942 1739.1350884701314) rotate(0 86.03838833895597 20)"><text x="86.03838833895597" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Factual claims about</text><text x="86.03838833895597" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">what is the case</text></g><g transform="translate(407.49311885171244 1730.9532702883134) rotate(0 91.46525573730472 30)"><text x="91.46525573730472" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Value judgements</text><text x="91.46525573730472" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">about what should be</text><text x="91.46525573730472" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">the case.</text></g><g transform="translate(220.7191133086102 1811.8623334541503) rotate(0 85.14823982932353 20)"><text x="85.14823982932353" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">E.g. "Smith murdered</text><text x="85.14823982932353" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Jones."</text></g><g transform="translate(399.1293520947876 1809.8623778433548) rotate(0 98.91982754794034 20)"><text x="98.91982754794034" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">E.g. "Smith shouldn't</text><text x="98.91982754794034" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">have murdered Jones"</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(621.7288130344664 1712.0268558235166) rotate(0 142 75)"><path d="M32 0 C77.42 0, 122.84 0, 252 0 C273.33 0, 284 10.67, 284 32 C284 49.21, 284 66.42, 284 118 C284 139.33, 273.33 150, 252 150 C166.13 150, 80.26 150, 32 150 C10.67 150, 0 139.33, 0 118 C0 96.34, 0 74.67, 0 32 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0 M0 32 C0 10.67, 10.67 0, 32 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(636.1289290012633 1717.0268558235166) rotate(0 127.59988403320312 70)"><text x="127.59988403320312" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Hume argues that there is a gap</text><text x="127.59988403320312" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">between the two kinds of claim:</text><text x="127.59988403320312" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">you cannot logically derive ought</text><text x="127.59988403320312" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">statements, like 'you ought not</text><text x="127.59988403320312" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">torture' from statements about</text><text x="127.59988403320312" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">what is, like 'that is an act of</text><text x="127.59988403320312" y="134.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">torture.'</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(228.03599580351226 1896.9305628453753) rotate(0 301.5 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C175.96 0, 334.42 0, 585.5 0 C597.17 0, 603 5.83, 603 17.5 C603 31.25, 603 44.99, 603 52.5 C603 64.17, 597.17 70, 585.5 70 C378.24 70, 170.99 70, 17.5 70 C5.83 70, 0 64.17, 0 52.5 C0 40.6, 0 28.71, 0 17.5 C0 5.83, 5.83 0, 17.5 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#ffd8a8"/><path d="M17.5 0 C209.92 0, 402.35 0, 585.5 0 M17.5 0 C185.28 0, 353.06 0, 585.5 0 M585.5 0 C597.17 0, 603 5.83, 603 17.5 M585.5 0 C597.17 0, 603 288.9197692871094 30)"><text x="288.9197692871094" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">We can argue that this is evidence for non-cognitivism: the reason we</text><text x="288.9197692871094" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">cannot derive 'ought' statements from 'is' statements because the former</text><text x="288.9197692871094" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">is non-cognitive and the latter is cognitive.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(221.75128078528803 1984.2909250737061) rotate(0 323.5 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C155.1 0, 292.7 0, 629.5 0 C641.17 0, 647 5.83, 647 17.5 C647 26.01, 647 34.51, 647 52.5 C647 64.17, 641.17 70, 629.5 70 C481.63 70, 333.77 70, 17.5 70 C5.83 70, 0 64.17, 0 52.5 C0 42.12, 0 31.75, 0 17.5 C0 5.83, 5.83 0, 17.5 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#ffd8a8"/><path d="M17.5 0 C188.97 0, 360.45 0, 629.5 0 M17.5 0 C226.4 0, 435.31 0, 629.5 0 M629.5 0 C641.17 0, 647 5.83, 647 17.5 M629.5 0 C641.17 0, 647 5.83, 647 17.5 M647 17.5 C647 26.58, C471.2 70, 312.9 70, 17.5 70 M17.5 70 C5.83 70, 0 64.17, 0 52.5 M17.5 70 C5.83 70, 0 64.17, 0 52.5 M0 52.5 C0 42.31, 0 32.13, 0 17.5 M0 52.5 C0 42.17, 0 31.83, 0 17.5 M0 17.5 C0 5.83, 5.83 0, 17.5 0 M0 17.5 C0 5.83, 5.83 0, 17.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(235.00353908606928 1989.2909250737061) rotate(0 310.24774169921875 30)"><text x="310.24774169921875" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Hume would say 'is' statements like "Smith murdered Jones" are capable of being</text><text x="310.24774169921875" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">true or false, whereas 'ought' statements like "Smith shouldn't have murdered</text><text x="310.24774169921875" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Jones" are expressions of emotion that are not capable of being true or false.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(513.6206070208817 1683.8518575190678) rotate(0 125.00410300679233 4.7999983044487635)"><path d="M0 0 C14.21 0, 28.42 0, 44.77 0 M0 0 C16.41 0, 32.82 0, Ayer: Language, truth, and logic</text></g><g transform="translate(635.000045806512 2185.049171607612) rotate(0 150 130.9999999999999)"><use href="#image-081d68eaecc638cb5d1e2797a4995692fc7b5287" 30)"><text x="113.1279067993164" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Ayer's verification principle is</text><text x="113.1279067993164" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">basically just Hume's fork</text><text x="113.1279067993164" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">with different words.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(217.43036539605475 2278.0661487643765) rotate(0 193.5 54.999999999999886)"><path d="M27.5 0 C127.44 0, 227.38 0, 359.5 0 C377.83 0, 387 9.17, 387 27.5 C387 45.21, 387 62.91, 387 82.5 C387 100.83, 377.83 110, 359.5 110 C237.68 110, 115.86 110, 27.5 110 C9.17 110, 0 100.83, 0 82.5 C0 61.37, 0 40.24, 0 27.5 C0 9.17, 9.17 0, 27.5 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#ffd8a8"/><path d="M27.5 0 C140.92 0, 254.35 0, 359.5 0 M27.5 0 C122.49 0, 217.48 0, 359.5 0 M359.5 0 C377.83 0, 387 9.17, 387 27.5 M359.5 0 C377.83 0, 387 9.17, 387 27.5 M387 27.5 C387 41.92, 387 56.34, 387 82.5 M387 27.5 C387 44.45, 387 61.39, 387 82.5 M387 82.5 C387 100.83, 377.83 110, 359.5 110 M387 82.5 C387 100.83, 377.83 110, 359.5 110 M359.5 110 C268.44 110, 177.37 110, 27.5 110 M359.5 110 C280.51 110, 201.53 110, 27.5 110 M27.5 110 C9.17 110, 0 100.83, 0 82.5 M27.5 110 C9.17 110, 0 100.83, 0 82.5 M0 82.5 C0 66.04, 0 49.58, 0 27.5 M0 82.5 C0 69.59, 0 56.67, 0 27.5 M0 27.5 C0 9.17, 9.17 0, 27.5 0 M0 27.5 C0 9.17, 9.17 0, 27.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(224.2665317778907 2283.0661487643765) rotate(0 186.66383361816406 49.999999999999886)"><text x="186.66383361816406" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Ayer argues that moral judgements fail the</text><text x="186.66383361816406" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">verification principle. "Murder is wrong" is clearly</text><text x="186.66383361816406" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">not an analytic truth, and Ayer argues that it</text><text x="186.66383361816406" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">isn't empirically verifiable either - both on the</text><text x="186.66383361816406" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">naturalist and non-naturalist interpretations:</text></g><g transform="translate(238.37844080669743 2428.143410321329) rotate(0 39.29595184326172 10)"><text x="39.29595184326172" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Naturalism</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(204.06189301066968 2422.960462555336) rotate(0 0 155.27636348043643)"><path d="M0 0 C0 51.76, 0 258.79, 0 310.55 M0 0 C0 51.76, 0 258.79, 0 310.55" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g></g><mask/><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(205.11646151815478 2422.960462555336) rotate(0 209.46309745032204 0)"><path d="M0 0 C69.82 0, 349.11 0, 418.93 0 M0 0 C69.82 0, 349.11 0, 418.93 0" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g></g><mask/><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(627.778017548086 2424.251484212117) rotate(0 0 157.37915859937743)"><path d="M0 0 C0 52.46, 0 262.3, 0 314.76 M0 0 C0 52.46, 0 262.3, 0 314.76" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g></g><mask/><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(422.05893047467885 2424.654220109404) rotate(0 0 155.80362020376515)"><path d="M0 0 C0 51.93, 0 259.67, 0 311.61 M0 0 C0 51.93, 0 259.67, 0 311.61" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g></g><mask/><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(207.22558847601454 2450.3791230646234) rotate(0 209.32464177827026 0)"><path d="M0 0 C69.77 0, 348.87 0, 418.65 0 M0 0 C69.77 0, 348.87 0, 418.65 0" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g></g><mask/><g transform="translate(458.6219669332229 2427.143308166344) rotate(0 55.11194610595703 10)"><text x="55.11194610595703" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">non-naturalism</text></g><g transform="translate(211.288158877481 2458.884836040382) rotate(0 100.57600482328547 120)"><text x="100.57600482328546" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Naturalism would argue</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">that we can prove that</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">murder causes pain/anger</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">etc. However, Ayer would</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">argue that this isn't the</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">same as proving murder is</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="134.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">wrong. We can empirically</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="154.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">verify that murder</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="174.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">causes pain, but we</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="194.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">cannot empirically verify</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="214.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">that murder has the</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="234.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">property of 'wrongness'</text></g><g transform="translate(427.5703563098052 2454.679938320231) rotate(0 96.32183178266244 140)"><text x="96.32183178266244" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Ayer also argues that</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">there is no way to</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">empirically verify the</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">presence of non-natural</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">properties - i.e.</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">supernatural properties.</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="134.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Even if "murder is</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="154.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">wrong" did possess the</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="174.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">non-natural property of</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="194.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">wrongness, how could we</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="214.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">ever prove this? The</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="234.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">existence of non-natural</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="254.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">properties cannot be</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="274.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">empirically proven.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(201.71859993847204 2732.597099182634) rotate(0 212.99424385391967 0)"><path d="M0 0 C71 0, 354.99 0, 425.99 0 M0 0 C71 0, 354.99 0, 425.99 0" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g></g><mask/><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(650.1015390580228 2539.1885150829225) rotate(0 126.5 55)"><path d="M27.5 0 C85.04 0, transform="translate(656.5136484330228 2544.1885150829225) rotate(0 120.087890625 50)"><text x="120.087890625" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Therefore, Ayer concludes</text><text x="120.087890625" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">that moral judgements simply</text><text x="120.087890625" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">express feelings of approval or</text><text x="120.087890625" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">disapproval, and seek to evoke</text><text x="120.087890625" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">the same feeling in others.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(495.1366169159299 2164.3832497365884) rotate(0 -27.63635995357494 26.903696840249495)"><path d="M0 0 C0 10.26, 0 20.52, 0 37.81 M0 0 C0 14.29, 0 28.59, 0 37.81 M0 37.81 C0 48.47, -5.33 53.81, -16 53.81 M0 37.81 C0 48.47, -5.33 53.81, -16 53.81 M-16 53.81 C-25.32 transform="translate(536.0684013063949 120.39996337890625) rotate(0 183.7598114013672 50)"><text x="183.7598114013672" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Ethical non-naturalism says that moral</text><text x="183.7598114013672" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">judgements are beliefs that are intended to be</text><text x="183.7598114013672" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">true or false (cognitivism) and that moral</text><text x="183.7598114013672" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">properties exist (realism) but are non-natural</text><text x="183.7598114013672" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">properties.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(701.7281341249982 223.80001831054688) rotate(0 127.5 25)"><path d="M12.5 0 C73.82 5.39, 134.74 4.07, 242.5 0 C250.73 -2.74, 252.87 3.99, 255 12.5 C256.77 23.01, 256.47 32.34, 255 Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Where naturalism is Aristotle,</text><text x="114.01588439941406" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">non-naturalism is Plato.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(561.5128326113263 288.79998779296875) rotate(0 204 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C142.5 3.02, 271.11 5.31, 390.5 0 C404.04 1.33, 409.87 6.86, 408 17.5 C410.28 28.83, 408.83 43.59, 408 52.5 C404.98 60.98, 401.24 71.69, 390.5 70 C316.57 75.92, 240.28 72.82, 17.5 70 C5.25 66.4, 0 M0 17.5 C-1.89 5.3, 7.71 -1.38, 17.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(571.3130035097638 293.79998779296875) rotate(0 194.1998291015625 30)"><text x="194.1998291015625" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">So, according to non-naturalism, "murder is wrong"</text><text x="194.1998291015625" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">expresses a cognitive belief that murder is wrong,</text><text x="194.1998291015625" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">where 'wrong' refers to a non-natural property.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(694.8886174852887 360.1999816894531) rotate(0 151 55)"><path d="M27.5 0 C127.65 -0.5, 226.83 1.03, 274.5 0 C291.24 1.77, 300.33 9.49, 302 27.5 C300.24 45.83, 297.61 57.74, 302 82.5 C305.38 102.66, 296.21 109.8, 274.5 110 C210.03 103.53, 147.2 transform="translate(706.3207311327496 365.1999816894531) rotate(0 139.56788635253906 50)"><text x="139.56788635253906" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">One way to think about non-natural</text><text x="139.56788635253906" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">properties is as non-physical</text><text x="139.56788635253906" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">properties. These non-natural moral</text><text x="139.56788635253906" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">properties cannot be reduced to</text><text x="139.56788635253906" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">anything simpler: they are basic.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(702.6101044246132 532.7310924832781) rotate(0 143 25)"><path d="M12.5 0 C96.82 -0.67, 182.78 3.44, 273.5 0 C283.17 0.81, 288 1.19, 286 12.5 C283.77 22.51, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">(this come's from Moore's book:</text><text x="122.66388702392578" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Principa Ethica)</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(562.2399490901405 500.4024192567855) rotate(0 119.5 17.5)"><path d="M8.75 0 114.4399185180664 12.5)"><text x="114.4399185180664" y="17.619999999999997" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#d54f07" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">The Naturalistic fallacy</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(595.2085236140663 587.7811184232195) rotate(0 193.5 25)"><path d="M12.5 0 C128.4 3.78, 247.48 1.94, 374.5 0 C386.25 -1.19, 385.15 4.96, 387 12.5 C387.62 22.59, 386.32 31.28, 387 37.5 C383.46 48.01, 380.85 50.19, 374.5 50 C279.29 53.13, 182.06 12.5 C0.45 5.57, 3.1 0.08, 12.5 0 M0 12.5 C-2.13 5.66, 5.32 0.85, 12.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(610.0686920710975 592.7811184232195) rotate(0 178.63983154296875 20)"><text x="178.63983154296875" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">This is the fallacy of equating goodness with</text><text x="178.63983154296875" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">some natural property (such as pleasure/pain)</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(591.3924377986366 651.2739413427927) rotate(0 200.5 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C135.53 1.89, 248.14 3.13, 383.5 0 C397.49 -0.78, 399.83 6.55, 401 17.5 C397.36 31.13, 398.91 40.6, 401 52.5 C399.83 62.82, 396.99 72.58, 383.5 70 C256.22 68.78, 129.73 66.58, 17.5 70 C8.86 69.84, -3.56 62.51, 0 52.5 C3.68 40.55, -1.92 30.99, 0 17.5 C-1.73 6.07, 5.6 -2.83, 17.5 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#ffd8a8"/><path d="M17.5 0 C140.26 -2.08, 264.91 -2.53, 383.5 0 M17.5 0 C146.54 -2.56, 275.77 -1.72, 383.5 0 M383.5 0 C397.03 1.95, 402.73 4.1, 401 17.5 M383.5 0 C394.56 -1.57, 402.03 4.57, 401 17.5 M401 17.5 C401.51 29.72, 401.6 41.25, 401 52.5 M401 17.5 C401.94 29.75, 400.44 39.78, 401 52.5 M401 52.5 C401.45 63.16, 395.21 71.1, C8.09 71.04, 1.95 62.71, 0 52.5 M0 52.5 C1.61 38.22, -0.28 26.08, 0 17.5 M0 52.5 C0.41 40.32, -0.35 26.76, 0 17.5 M0 17.5 C-1.85 7.13, 6.84 0.74, 17.5 0 M0 17.5 C0.52 7.11, 3.93 -0.84, 17.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(597.4125794001991 656.2739413427927) rotate(0 194.4798583984375 30)"><text x="194.4798583984375" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">For example, Moore says it is a fallacy to</text><text x="194.4798583984375" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">conclude that drinking beer is good from the fact</text><text x="194.4798583984375" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">that drinking beer is pleasurable.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(631.4722717830116 743.416826823401) rotate(0 162.5 45)"><path d="M22.5 0 C99.01 -1.46, 171.07 -0.3, 302.5 0 40.53, 0 22.5 C2.87 7.14, 4.65 -3.11, 22.5 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#ffd8a8"/><path d="M22.5 0 C109.46 0.99, 196.14 0.4, 302.5 0 M22.5 0 C82.17 -0.22, 141.07 -1.64, 302.5 0 M302.5 0 22.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(637.9004028865272 748.416826823401) rotate(0 156.07186889648438 40)"><text x="156.07186889648438" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">These are two different categories of</text><text x="156.07186889648438" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">properties - even if they are correlated,</text><text x="156.07186889648438" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">it can't follow that they are the same</text><text x="156.07186889648438" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">thing.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(724.816601616996 862.3310113937135) rotate(0 177.99999999999994 45)"><path d="M22.5 0 C109.73 -1.22, 195.95 -3.33, 333.5 0 C350.67 -1.99, 356.19 6.33, 356 22.5 C358.07 36.28, 353.5 45.12, 356 67.5 C359.38 81.76, 348.34 93.03, 333.5 90 C241.81 87.23, 147.25 90.63, 22.5 90 C6.35 87.85, 0.1 80.77, 0 67.5 C2.93 53.35, -2.8 36.8, 0 22.5 C2.37 7.73, 9.21 -1.67, 22.5 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#ffd8a8"/><path d="M22.5 0 C122.23 0.35, 225.17 1.63, 333.5 0 M22.5 0 C145.98 C-0.76 6.32, 8.01 1.48, 22.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(732.5207642146522 867.3310113937135) rotate(0 170.29583740234378 40)"><text x="170.29583740234375" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">From this, Moore would argue that Mill's</text><text x="170.29583740234375" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">proof is invalid: To conclude that happiness</text><text x="170.29583740234375" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">(a natural property) is 'good' (a moral</text><text x="170.29583740234375" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#e8590c" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">property) commits the naturalistic fallacy.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(667.5085993267251 541.3982852148637) rotate(0 8.049564887692597 21.079496167577645)"><path d="M0 0 C1.06 11.66, -0.79 21.32, 0 35.55 M0 0 C0.26 8.5, 0.46 Moore: Principa Ethica</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(130.82611186920667 193.83885955810547) rotate(0 140.5 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C87.12 6.32, 152.74 5.83, 263.5 0 C272.52 font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Moore argues that it is an open</text><text x="124.48788452148438" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">question whether 'pleasure' and</text><text x="124.48788452148438" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">'good' are the same thing.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(148.5981493753102 278.58888244628906) rotate(0 124 55)"><path d="M27.5 0 C73.46 2.72, 114.91 1.09, 220.5 0 C241.51 -1.91, 244.75 12.17, 248 27.5 C247.27 font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">- Closed question: "Is good</text><text x="110.11988830566406" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">good?" or "is pleasure</text><text x="110.11988830566406" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">pleasure?"</text><text x="110.11988830566406" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">- Open question: "is pleasure</text><text x="110.11988830566406" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">good?"</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(77.66832836090589 411.83885192871094) rotate(0 205.5 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C160.11 2.73, 297.63 5.42, 393.5 0 C405.09 1.71, 412.58 2.76, 411 17.5 C409.85 30.34, 409.58 42.02, 411 52.5 C407.96 67.02, 403.06 68.08, 393.5 70 C248.76 67.49, 102.42 69.51, 17.5 70 C2.76 5.68 -0.02, 17.5 0 M0 17.5 C1.42 7.55, 5.79 0.68, 17.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(87.87253673492933 416.83885192871094) rotate(0 195.29579162597656 30)"><text x="195.29579162597656" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Moore argues that if goodness and pleasure really</text><text x="195.29579162597656" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">were the same thing (as Naturalism argues), the</text><text x="195.29579162597656" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">question "is pleasure good?" would be closed.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(50.88383968292737 481.08888244628906) rotate(0 145 65)"><path d="M32 0 C96.66 0.83, 163.56 -1.48, 258 0 C278.8 -0.33, 289.2 8.84, 290 32 C289.02 49.44, 292.64 59.3, 290 98 C292.54 117.4, 281.76 131.38, 258 130 C210.85 135.57, 159.9 135.65, 32 130 C13.63 127.3, -0.12 122.16, 0 98 C3.3 84.07, 3.02 62.64, 0 32 C-3.4 10.3, 8.04 0.86, 32 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#a5d8ff"/><path d="M32 0 C117.49 -1.82, 199.45 -2.96, 258 0 M32 0 C84.94 0.17, 138.53 -1.02, 258 0 M258 0 C280.89 0.87, 288.2 9.56, 290 32 M258 0 C278.58 -0.64, 288.18 10.94, 290 32 M290 32 C289.17 51.7, 290.65 68.64, 290 98 M290 32 C290.61 47.81, 290.17 C1.92 9.64, 9.15 1.81, 32 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(57.42796810089612 486.08888244628906) rotate(0 138.45587158203125 60)"><text x="138.45587158203125" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">In other words, Moore is arguing</text><text x="138.45587158203125" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">that is naturalism were true and</text><text x="138.45587158203125" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">'good' = 'pleasure', it wouldn't make</text><text x="138.45587158203125" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">sense to ask "is pleasure good?"</text><text x="138.45587158203125" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">because that would be the same as</text><text x="138.45587158203125" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">asking "is pleasure pleasure?"</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(246.40821559845472 669.0887603759766) rotate(0 160.5 45)"><path d="M22.5 0 C101.38 1.61, 174.37 5.72, 298.5 0 C315.2 -1.17, 323.54 5.56, 321 22.5 C324.4 41.93, 322.89 58.82, 321 67.5 C319.73 85.83, 316.46 87.3, 298.5 90 C215.61 89.94, 136.92 90.87, 22.5 90 C10.1 88.83, -3.4 C7.09 89.95, -1.87 83.08, 0 67.5 M22.5 90 C9.76 88.22, 1.87 80.81, 0 67.5 M0 67.5 C1.5 54.3, 0.59 42.67, 0 22.5 M0 67.5 C-0.04 55.73, 1.19 45.25, 0 22.5 M0 22.5 C0.95 8.38, 5.79 1.53, 22.5 0 M0 22.5 C-2.25 7.53, 7.16 -0.21, 22.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(251.6923647683766 674.0887603759766) rotate(0 155.21585083007812 40)"><text x="155.21585083007812" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">It doesn't seem to follow that because</text><text x="155.21585083007812" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">"is pleasure good?" is an open question,</text><text x="155.21585083007812" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">pleasure and good cannot be the same</text><text x="155.21585083007812" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">thing.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(109.88387401520276 776.0888824462891) rotate(0 169.5 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C131.15 -4.92, 245.04 -0.59, 321.5 0 C334.75 3.24, 337.73 9.16, 339 17.5 C341.36 29.4, 337.26 46.21, 339 transform="translate(122.89602001129651 781.0888824462891) rotate(0 156.48785400390625 30)"><text x="156.48785400390625" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">There are plenty of examples where two</text><text x="156.48785400390625" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">things are the same thing, but it is still</text><text x="156.48785400390625" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">an open question to ask if they are.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(60.712122357081 859.6722310384114) rotate(0 143 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C106.53 3.71, 187.94 1.21, 268.5 0 C283 -1.48, 284.73 7.79, 286 17.5 C285.38 27.41, 286.19 41.48, 286 52.5 transform="translate(71.03225175161225 864.6722310384114) rotate(0 132.67987060546875 30)"><text x="132.67987060546875" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">e.g. 'water' and 'H2O' refer to the</text><text x="132.67987060546875" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">same thing, but it is still an open</text><text x="132.67987060546875" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">question to ask "is water H2O?"</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(256.6181460183766 930.6720886230469) rotate(0 122.5 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C98.74 3.72, 179.3 3.47, 227.5 0 C238 -3.4, 244.64 3.21, 245 17.5 C242.55 31.32, 248.8 37.97, 245 52.5 Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">(Whether or not you agree</text><text x="103.72791290283203" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">with this counterargument</text><text x="103.72791290283203" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">is... an open question.)</text></g><g mask="url(#mask-47xVg84k)" Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Having argued against</text><text x="124.14388275146484" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">naturalism, Moore sets out non-</text><text x="124.14388275146484" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">naturalism - a.k.a. intuitionism.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(619.7745960780555 1160.866837395562) rotate(0 155.5 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C127.54 -1.28, 240.02 -1.55, 293.5 0 C308.61 0.69, 312.62 8.7, 311 17.5 C314.33 27.02, 308.77 36.01, 311 fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(628.9947193690712 1165.866837395562) rotate(0 146.27987670898438 30)"><text x="146.27987670898438" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Although we might ask: "if moral</text><text x="146.27987670898438" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">properties are non-natural properties,</text><text x="146.27987670898438" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">how do we know about them?"</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(698.3283527919227 1246.866822136773) rotate(0 165.5 55)"><path d="M27.5 0 C103.57 1.48, 177.32 -0.27, 303.5 0 C324.06 3.22, 329.78 6.83, 331 27.5 C331.27 41.48, 332.69 49.21, 331 stroke-width="2" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(707.9885090419227 1251.866822136773) rotate(0 155.83984375 50)"><text x="155.83984375" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">It's no mystery how we know about</text><text x="155.83984375" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">natural properties -- such as colour,</text><text x="155.83984375" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">shape, size, etc. But non-natural</text><text x="155.83984375" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">properties are more difficult to explain:</text><text x="155.83984375" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">they can't be scientifically investigated.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(536.0134851364867 1376.0669767591687) rotate(0 171 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C107.05 1.18, 192.91 0.15, 324.5 0 C336.42 0.44, 343.61 2.64, 342 17.5 C340.41 23.86, 344.83 30.72, 342 52.5 C343.16 66.94, 336.43 72.81, 324.5 1381.0669767591687) rotate(0 165.9598388671875 30)"><text x="165.9598388671875" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">The first obvious critique to Intuitionism</text><text x="165.9598388671875" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">is Ayer's verification principle. You can find</text><text x="165.9598388671875" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Moore's response to this</text><text x="96.80790710449219" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">problem is 'intuition'.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(681.2414272853309 1540.2001554701062) rotate(0 157.5 45)"><path d="M22.5 0 C123.72 4.04, 225.34 3.13, 292.5 0 C310.27 0.26, 317.81 7.39, 315 22.5 C313.97 Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">He argues that, via the faculty of</text><text x="146.97586059570312" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">rational intuition, we can directly</text><text x="146.97586059570312" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">reflect on the truth of moral</text><text x="146.97586059570312" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">judgements such as "murder is wrong".</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(692.1439083644325 1637.95009443495) rotate(0 150.5 25)"><path d="M12.5 0 C106.35 -0.36, 196.84 0.25, 288.5 0 C299.33 -1.19, 303.9 3.34, 301 12.5 C302.36 18.15, 302.7 31.6, 301 37.5 C303.82 46.58, 299.81 50.86, 288.5 50 C232.29 53.35, 171.72 48.57, 12.5 50 C4.72 49.25, 20)"><text x="137.59986877441406" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">The truth/falsehood of such moral</text><text x="137.59986877441406" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">judgements is self-evident.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">A.J. Ayer: Language, truth, and logic</text></g><g transform="translate(635.1034606750638 2298.2970886618036) rotate(0 150 131)"><use href="#image-081d68eaecc638cb5d1e2797a4995692fc7b5287" width="300" height="262" opacity="1"/></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(191.71731187733178 2296.5385604712787) rotate(0 121.5 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C60.29 0, 103.08 0, 225.5 0 C237.17 0, 243
