x="113.1279067993164" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Ayer's verification principle is</text><text x="113.1279067993164" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">basically just Hume's fork</text><text x="113.1279067993164" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">with different words.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(217.53378026460643 2391.314065818568) rotate(0 193.5 55)"><path d="M27.5 0 C155.15 0, 282.81 0, 359.5 0 C377.83 0, 387 9.17, 387 27.5 C387 43.66, 387 59.81, 387 82.5 C387 100.83, 377.83 110, 359.5 110 C239.02 110, 118.55 110, 27.5 110 C9.17 110, 0 100.83, 0 82.5 C0 68.46, 0 54.42, 0 27.5 C0 9.17, 9.17 0, 27.5 0" stroke="none" stroke-width="0" fill="#ffd8a8"/><path d="M27.5 0 C133.78 0, 240.06 0, 359.5 0 M27.5 0 C102.78 0, 178.06 0, 359.5 0 M359.5 0 C377.83 0, 387 9.17, 387 27.5 M359.5 0 C377.83 0, 387 9.17, 387 27.5 M387 27.5 C387 43.26, 387 59.03, 387 82.5 M387 27.5 C387 46.5, 387 65.51, 387 82.5 M387 82.5 C387 100.83, 377.83 110, 359.5 110 M387 82.5 C387 100.83, 377.83 110, 359.5 110 M359.5 110 C289.17 110, 218.83 110, 27.5 110 M359.5 110 C271.06 110, 182.61 110, 27.5 110 M27.5 110 C9.17 110, 0 100.83, 0 82.5 M27.5 110 C9.17 110, 0 100.83, 0 82.5 M0 82.5 C0 60.59, 0 38.68, 0 27.5 M0 82.5 C0 60.6, 0 38.69, 0 27.5 M0 27.5 C0 9.17, 9.17 0, 27.5 0 M0 27.5 C0 9.17, 9.17 0, 27.5 0" stroke="transparent" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(224.36994664644237 2396.314065818568) rotate(0 186.66383361816406 50)"><text x="186.66383361816406" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Ayer argues that moral judgements fail the</text><text x="186.66383361816406" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">verification principle. "Murder is wrong" is clearly</text><text x="186.66383361816406" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">not an analytic truth, and Ayer argues that it</text><text x="186.66383361816406" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">isn't empirically verifiable either - both on the</text><text x="186.66383361816406" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">naturalist and non-naturalist interpretations:</text></g><g transform="translate(238.48185567524922 2541.391327375521) rotate(0 39.29595184326172 10)"><text x="39.29595184326172" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Naturalism</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(204.1653078792216 2536.208379609528) rotate(0 0 155.27636348043643)"><path d="M0 0 C0 51.76, 0 258.79, 0 310.55 M0 0 C0 51.76, 0 258.79, 0 310.55" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g></g><mask/><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(205.21987638670646 2536.208379609528) rotate(0 209.46309745032204 0)"><path d="M0 0 C69.82 0, 349.11 0, 418.93 0 M0 0 C69.82 0, 349.11 0, 418.93 0" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g></g><mask/><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(627.8814324166377 2537.4994012663087) rotate(0 0 157.37915859937743)"><path d="M0 0 C0 52.46, 0 262.3, 0 314.76 M0 0 C0 52.46, 0 262.3, 0 314.76" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g></g><mask/><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(422.16234534323064 2537.902137163596) rotate(0 0 155.80362020376515)"><path d="M0 0 C0 51.93, 0 259.67, 0 311.61 M0 0 C0 51.93, 0 259.67, 0 311.61" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g></g><mask/><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(207.32900334456633 2563.627040118815) rotate(0 209.32464177827026 0)"><path d="M0 0 C69.77 0, 348.87 0, 418.65 0 M0 0 C69.77 0, 348.87 0, 418.65 0" stroke="#1e1e1e" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"/></g></g><mask/><g transform="translate(458.7253818017747 2540.3912252205355) rotate(0 55.11194610595703 10)"><text x="55.11194610595703" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">non-naturalism</text></g><g transform="translate(211.3915737460328 2572.1327530945737) rotate(0 100.57600482328546 120)"><text x="100.57600482328546" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Naturalism would argue</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">that we can prove that</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">murder causes pain/anger</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">etc. However, Ayer would</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">argue that this isn't the</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">same as proving murder is</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="134.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">wrong. We can empirically</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="154.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">verify that murder</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="174.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">causes pain, but we</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="194.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">cannot empirically verify</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="214.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">that murder has the</text><text x="100.57600482328546" y="234.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">property of 'wrongness'</text></g><g transform="translate(427.673771178357 2567.927855374423) rotate(0 96.32183178266244 140)"><text x="96.32183178266244" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Ayer also argues that</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">there is no way to</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">empirically verify the</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">presence of non-natural</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">properties - i.e.</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">supernatural properties.</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="134.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Even if "murder is</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="154.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">wrong" did possess the</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="174.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">non-natural property of</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="194.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">wrongness, how could we</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="214.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">ever prove this? The</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="234.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">existence of non-natural</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="254.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">properties cannot be</text><text x="96.32183178266244" y="274.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">empirically proven.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(201.82201480702372 2845.845016236826) rotate(0 212.99424385391967 0)"><path d="M0 0 C71 0, 354.99 0, 425.99 0 M0 0 C71 0, 354.99 0, 425.99 0" transform="translate(656.6170633015746 2657.436432137114) rotate(0 120.087890625 50)"><text x="120.087890625" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Therefore, Ayer concludes</text><text x="120.087890625" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">that moral judgements simply</text><text x="120.087890625" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">express feelings of approval or</text><text x="120.087890625" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">disapproval, and seek to evoke</text><text x="120.087890625" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">the same feeling in others.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round"><g transform="translate(495.2400317844818 2277.63116679078) rotate(0 -27.636359953574996 173.31982421875 30)"><text x="173.31982421875" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Mackie's main argument for moral anti-realism</text><text x="173.31982421875" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">is that moral properties would have to be</text><text x="173.31982421875" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">very strange (or 'queer'). His reasons are:</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(64.84367370605491 1278.5749319167376) rotate(0 77.5 15)"><path d="M7.5 0 C56.49 0.21, 109.85 -1.57, 147.5 0 C152.07 -1.93, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Epistemically queer</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(120.5316569010418 1311.374899364654) rotate(0 197.5 65)"><path d="M32 0 C132.75 2.76, 236.62 4.56, 363 0 C386.72 0.66, 396.09 11.35, 395 32 C397.84 57.96, 393.39 77.13, 395 98 transform="translate(127.56785074869805 1316.374899364654) rotate(0 190.46380615234375 60)"><text x="190.46380615234375" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">If mind-independent moral-properties exist, then</text><text x="190.46380615234375" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">it is a total mystery as to how we would acquire</text><text x="190.46380615234375" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">knowledge of them. Whereas natural knowledge</text><text x="190.46380615234375" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">can be explained naturally, moral knowledge</text><text x="190.46380615234375" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">cannot, and instead requires spooky hypotheses</text><text x="190.46380615234375" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">(aka intuitionism.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(76.79827880859392 1459.6415823073626) rotate(0 84.5 15)"><path d="M7.5 0 C64.59 1.44, 120.06 -1.68, 161.5 0 C169.43 1.99, 167.47 -0.31, 169 7.5 C171.41 11.96, 167.09 15.18, 169 22.5 C171.07 26.36, 168.5 26.96, 161.5 30 C120.69 27.15, 81.95 28.93, 7.5 30 C0.65 29.42, -1.68 dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Metaphysically queer</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(127.9982706705731 1495.9082245599666) rotate(0 198 105)"><path d="M32 0 C156.68 1.99, 282.84 2.48, 364 0 C388.89 -0.27, 393.79 8.47, 396 32 C392.12 82.96, 392.96 137.05, 396 178 C396.08 195.99, 387.56 208.43, 364 210 C283.18 205.95, 199.36 207.8, 32 210 C7.78 208.46, 1.32 199.16, 0 178 -0.54, 32 0" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" fill="none"/></g><g transform="translate(134.73444620768248 1500.9082245599666) rotate(0 191.26382446289062 100)"><text x="191.26382446289062" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">If mind-independent moral properties exist, they</text><text x="191.26382446289062" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">must be metaphysically unlike anything else we</text><text x="191.26382446289062" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">have experienced. E.g. 'good' things would need</text><text x="191.26382446289062" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">to somehow have 'to-be-done-ness' built into</text><text x="191.26382446289062" y="94.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">them, and bad things 'not-to-be-done-ness' into</text><text x="191.26382446289062" y="114.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">them. Like, the act of stealing itself would have</text><text x="191.26382446289062" y="134.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">to have the property of 'don't do this' built into</text><text x="191.26382446289062" y="154.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">it - which doesn't make sense. It's not possible</text><text x="191.26382446289062" y="174.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">for objective, physical objects to relate to</text><text x="191.26382446289062" y="194.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">human motivations in this way.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(536.6313804766993 1750.14010419037) rotate(0 167.5 35)"><path d="M17.5 0 C118.75 0.11, 224.62 1.55, 317.5 0 C329.67 -0.5, 334.65 5.03, 335 17.5 C332.06 31.84, 331.71 42.56, 335 transform="translate(546.8115409991602 1755.14010419037) rotate(0 157.31983947753906 30)"><text x="157.31983947753906" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Another way of getting at the</text><text x="157.31983947753906" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">metaphysical weirdness is to question</text><text x="157.31983947753906" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">how moral facts relate to natural facts.</text></g><g Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Imagine someone stealing from a shop.</text><text x="152.09585571289062" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">Then, imagine someone stealing from a</text><text x="152.09585571289062" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">shop, and this action has the property</text><text x="152.09585571289062" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">of wrongness.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(539.6901788739879 1922.0459425022573) rotate(0 116 45)"><path d="M22.5 0 C65.87 -0.54, 103.88 1.47, 209.5 0 C225.8 -3.41, 235 10.47, 232 22.5 C233.23 35.01, 231.95 52.01, 232 67.5 C232.51 84.34, 225.86 89.79, 209.5 90 C150.8 87.42, 87.18 87.26, 22.5 90 C7.54 93.25, -0.86 85.78, 0 67.5 C2.43 y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">What's the difference? What</text><text x="110.42389678955078" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">does the property of</text><text x="110.42389678955078" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">'wrongness' add? It's</text><text x="110.42389678955078" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">entirely unclear.</text></g><g stroke-linecap="round" transform="translate(613.1020261568463 2017.5753686281764) rotate(0 133.5 45)"><path d="M22.5 0 x="124.67188262939453" y="14.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">So, Mackie is arguing that the</text><text x="124.67188262939453" y="34.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">queerness of moral properties is</text><text x="124.67188262939453" y="54.096000000000004" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">evidence that they do not</text><text x="124.67188262939453" y="74.096" font-family="Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="16px" fill="#1e1e1e" text-anchor="middle" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">exist.</text></g></svg>
